languages.text: "Многое позабыто. В Уставе про наш полк не написано, сами понимаете". {n}Иждриг запускает руку в бороду, резко выдергивая оттуда какой-то извивающийся стручок.{/n} "Родом мы с Мерова. Это такое место, где братья-генералы пытаются каждого схватить и в штрафной полк определить. Дышишь не так или говоришь не то? Добро пожаловать на службу".

"A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."
languages.original_text: "Многое позабыто. В Уставе про наш полк не написано, сами понимаете". {n}Иждриг запускает руку в бороду, резко выдергивая оттуда какой-то извивающийся стручок.{/n} "Родом мы с Мерова. Это такое место, где братья-генералы пытаются каждого схватить и в штрафной полк определить. Дышишь не так или говоришь не то? Добро пожаловать на службу".

traits.locale_text: "Much has been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the codes, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We come from Merov. It's the kind of place where the brother-generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

"A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Code, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

"Well, I can only tell you what I know from our regulations and the First Call-Up's stories. Merov, you see, is a hive world somewhere in Calixis. And the people there belong to the place where they work. Work in a manufactorum? You're the property of its owner. Something like that. So, there were thirty Brother-Generals, and by all accounts, they were the worst of the worst. They used to make the convicts fight each other for entertainment or torment those closest to them."

"Much has been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the codes, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We come from Merov. It's the kind of place where the brother-generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

"A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Code, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

"A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

languages.text: 「まあ、私が知っているのは、規定とファーストコールアップの話を聞くだけですが。メローヴは、カリシスのどこかにあるハブワールドです。そして、その住民は、自分が働く場所の所有物です。製造所での仕事？その所有者の所有物です。そんな感じですね。それで、30人のブラザー・ジェネラルがいたのですが、評判では、最悪の最悪の連中でした。囚人を娯楽のために、あるいは最も近い人々を苦しめるために、互いに戦わせることもありました」
languages.original_text: "Well, I can only tell you what I know from our regulations and the First Call-Up's stories. Merov, you see, is a hive world somewhere in Calixis. And the people there belong to the place where they work. Work in a manufactorum? You're the property of its owner. Something like that. So, there were thirty Brother-Generals, and by all accounts, they were the worst of the worst. They used to make the convicts fight each other for entertainment or torment those closest to them."

traits.locale_text: 「まあ、私が知っているのは、規定とファーストコールアップの話を聞くだけですが。メローヴは、カリシスのどこかにあるハブワールドです。そして、その住民は、自分が働く場所の所有物です。製造所での仕事？その所有者の所有物です。そんな感じですね。それで、30人のブラザー・ジェネラルがいたのですが、評判では、最悪の最悪の連中でした。囚人を娯楽のために、あるいは最も近い人々を苦しめるために、互いに戦わせることもありました。」

languages.text: « Bien des choses ont sombré dans l'oubli au fil du temps. Ce n'est pas comme si notre régiment figurait en bonne place dans le Manuel, si vous voyez ce que je veux dire. » {n}Izdrig plonge une main dans sa barbe, dont il arrache brutalement une brindille frétillante.{/n} « Nous sommes originaires de Merov. Le genre d'endroit où les frères-généraux sautent sur le moindre prétexte pour vous arrêter et vous condamner au service pénal. Un geste de travers ou un mot de trop, et on vous embarque aussi sec. »
languages.original_text: "A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

traits.locale_text: « Bien des choses ont sombré dans l'oubli au fil du temps. Ce n'est pas comme si notre régiment figurait en bonne place dans le Manuel, si vous voyez ce que je veux dire. » {n}Izdrig plonge une main dans sa barbe, dont il arrache brutalement une brindille frétillante.{/n} « Nous sommes originaires de Merov. Le genre d'endroit où les frères-généraux sautent sur le moindre prétexte pour vous arrêter et vous condamner au service pénal. Un geste de travers ou un mot de trop, et on vous embarque aussi sec. »

languages.text: "Pek çok şey unutuldu. Alayımız, El Kitabı'nda bir yerde geçmiyor yani." {n}Elini sakalına daldıran İzdrig, kıpır kıpır bir sapı aniden çekip çıkarıyor.{/n} "Biz Merov'dan geldik. Orası Rahip Generallerin birilerini yakalayıp bir ceza infazl lejyonuna atmak için sürekli bahane aradığı bir yer. Yanlış şekilde nefes mi aldın, yanlış bir şey mi söyledin... Hizmete hoş geldin."
languages.original_text: "A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

traits.locale_text: "Pek çok şey unutuldu. Alayımız, El Kitabı'nda bir yerde geçmiyor yani." {n}Elini sakalına daldıran İzdrig, kıpır kıpır bir sapı aniden çekip çıkarıyor.{/n} "Biz Merov'dan geldik. Orası Rahip Generallerin birilerini yakalayıp bir ceza infazl lejyonuna atmak için sürekli bahane aradığı bir yer. Yanlış şekilde nefes mi aldın, yanlış bir şey mi söyledin... Hizmete hoş geldin."

languages.text: «Gran parte de nuestra historia ha caído en el olvido. Tampoco es que se mencione nuestro regimiento en el manual, no sé si me entiende». {n}Izdrig se lleva la mano a la barba y se arranca un palpitante tallo de un tirón .{/n} «Venimos de Merov. Es la clase de sitio donde los hermanos generales están siempre buscando excusas para engrosar las legiones penales con cualquier incauto. ¿Has respirado más fuerte de la cuenta o has dicho algo que no debías? Bienvenido al servicio».
languages.original_text: "A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

traits.locale_text: «Gran parte de nuestra historia ha caído en el olvido. Tampoco es que se mencione nuestro regimiento en el manual, no sé si me entiende». {n}Izdrig se lleva la mano a la barba y se arranca un palpitante tallo de un tirón .{/n} «Venimos de Merov. Es la clase de sitio donde los hermanos generales están siempre buscando excusas para engrosar las legiones penales con cualquier incauto. ¿Has respirado más fuerte de la cuenta o has dicho algo que no debías? Bienvenido al servicio».

languages.text: “很多历史都被遗忘了。您也明白，像我们这样的军团，可不会出现在《手册》的哪个章节里。”{n}伊兹德里格伸手在胡子里掏了掏，猛地拽出一根扭动的茎。{/n}“我们来自梅罗夫。那地方的将军兄弟整天找借口抓人去判罪军团。喘错一口气，说错一句话？那就来服役吧。”
languages.original_text: "A lot's been forgotten. It's not like our regiment is mentioned somewhere in the Handbook, if you catch my meaning." {n}Izdrig digs a hand into his beard, abruptly yanking out a wriggling stalk.{/n} "We came from Merov. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."

traits.locale_text: “很多历史都被遗忘了。您也明白，像我们这样的军团，可不会出现在《手册》的哪个章节里。”{n}伊兹德里格伸手在胡子里掏了掏，猛地拽出一根扭动的茎。{/n}“我们来自梅罗夫。那地方的将军兄弟整天找借口抓人去判罪军团。喘错一口气，说错一句话？那就来服役吧。”

languages.text: "Es wurde viel vergessen. Unser Regiment wird schließlich nicht im Handbuch erwähnt, falls Ihr wisst, was ich meine." {n}Izdrig fährt sich mit der Hand in seinen Bart und reißt einen Strunk heraus.{/n} "Wir kamen von Merov. Einem Ort, an dem die Bruder-Generäle ständig nach einem Grund suchen, unschuldige Leute in die Straflegion zu stecken. Ihr habt falsch geatmet oder das Falsche gesagt? Willkommen im Dienst."
languages.original_text: "A lot's been forgotten. It's the kind of place where the Brother-Generals are constantly looking for an excuse to snatch you up and throw you into a penal legion. Breathe the wrong way or say the wrong thing? Welcome to the service."
